title: [召集派嬲手足] 意大利餐廳Capo Group fb 明文寫明唔scan 出殯唔俾入，做第一間講到咁白都叫威

replies.msg:
意大利餐廳只招待「安心出行」用戶 指程式助追蹤確診者防疫 「已受夠假名假號碼」

在港擁最少 6 間餐廳的意大利餐飲集團「Capo Group Ltd」，旗下部分餐廳日前在社交專頁宣布，只招待使用「安心出行」應用程式客人。餐廳解釋，曾收到使用「安心出行」的顧客通知，得知有確診者或曾到訪旗下餐廳，可立刻安排消毒清潔。帖文又批評客人手寫資料中，經常有假名如「米奇老鼠」及假電話號碼，形容「安心出行」是唯一可信方式。

餐廳方面認為，使用「安心出行」可減輕大家的焦慮及不安，員工可放心招待客人，若顧客不按規矩掃瞄「安心出行」，要有心理準備或被拒進入餐廳。

全文:
https://www.thestandnews.com/society/%E6%84%8F%E5%A4%A7%E5%88%A9%E9%A4%90%E5%BB%B3%E5%8F%AA%E6%8B%9B%E5%BE%85-%E5%AE%89%E5%BF%83%E5%87%BA%E8%A1%8C-%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B6-%E6%8C%87%E7%A8%8B%E5%BC%8F%E5%8A%A9%E8%BF%BD%E8%B9%A4%E7%A2%BA%E8%A8%BA%E8%80%85%E9%98%B2%E7%96%AB-%E5%B7%B2%E5%8F%97%E5%A4%A0%E5%81%87%E5%90%8D%E5%81%87%E8%99%9F%E7%A2%BC/?fbclid=IwAR0toyDKzoXtn-cBE5kHecAXEhU_0A2_iKe-e_RgWTPxZYDA_TlMFOAvBYs

Capo Group facebook 個post:
With the recent outbreak the only way we can sleep well at night is knowing we are doing all we can to keep our staff and customers safe.

We need a reliable way to register people visiting our outlets. The only reliable way is if we use the leave home safe app.

We are grateful that the app alerted two of our customers @pincopallinohk to a potential case and allowed us to react fast.

We closed immediately, sent staff to be tested and booked a deep clean all within 24hrs of the information being recieved. This obviously put huge stress on the staff. The restaurant is now open again.

Please for one moment step into our shoes of what it's like to serve without knowing if we are safe to do so?

The app helps reduce anxiety amongst our team so we can enjoy serving you!

If you have been someone or with someone who has walked into a restaurant and the server has asked you to scan and you have said...
"I have no phone, no wifi/data, or my phone has just broke? "

Or you agree to use paper or our restaurant form and you write a fake name and number down or your handwriting is so bad we can't read it. Or you add your details as Mickey Mouse living at Disneyland.

Well sorry we've really had enough and we are not comfortable with that anymore.

So scan the leave home safe app at our outlets or expect to be refused entry and make other dining arrangements.

Capo Group Ltd
